hero.subheadline: DePIN-powered proxy infrastructure with decentralized relay nodes, genuine residential IPs, and white-label APIs.

problem.label: The Problem
problem.title: The centralized proxy market is fundamentally broken
problem.trustBody: Centralized VPN providers and proxy services shut down without warning — taking user funds and data with them.
problem.monopolyBody: Residential IP resources are controlled by a handful of companies. Prices are $8-15/GB. Access is restricted.
problem.failureBody: When one provider is blocked or seized, every user loses access simultaneously. No redundancy, no recourse.

solution.label: The Solution
solution.title: Two products, one decentralized network
solution.consumerDesc: Global network of datacenter relay nodes delivering low-latency, high-bandwidth proxy access. One-tap connect via our Android app. Monthly subscription starting at $8.
solution.businessDesc: Real home broadband IPs sourced ethically through DePIN incentives. Anti-detection grade purity for e-commerce, data collection, and account management.
solution.businessFeat1: Genuine residential IPs from real homes
solution.businessFeat3: IP pool rotation or dedicated binding
solution.bottomNote: Both product lines share the same decentralized supply network, the same app, and the same $MIWIM token economy. The split is in routing and pricing — not infrastructure.

howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.title: A three-sided marketplace for bandwidth
howItWorks.platformItems: Node Scheduler,Smart Routing,Token Economy,Subscription API,White-Label Gateway

keyNumbers.label: Market Opportunity
keyNumbers.title: Building at the intersection of three massive markets

tokenomics.label: $MIWIM Token
tokenomics.title: Not a fundraising tool — the network's settlement layer
tokenomics.governDesc: Token holders vote on network params
tokenomics.burnDesc: 10% of revenue buys back and burns

roadmap.label: Roadmap
roadmap.title: From MVP to global network
roadmap.q3Items: MVP launch,10+ nodes,100 beta users,Seed round
roadmap.q4Items: iOS + Desktop,White-label API,50+ nodes,1K users,First B2B

waitlist.label: Join the Network
waitlist.title: Two ways to get involved
waitlist.userDesc: Be among the first to use Miwim. Waitlist members get priority access and airdrop eligibility.
waitlist.providerDesc: Contribute idle servers or home bandwidth. Genesis node providers earn founding rewards and bonus token allocation.
